channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-06-28 to 2026-07-04
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 4 INTERESTING, 3 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Sun 2026-06-28: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 2 kt SSW, water 66°F. Low tide: 00:48, 12:39. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (SSW). Mon 2026-06-29: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 2 kt NW, water 67°F. Low tide: 01:32, 13:24. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Tue 2026-06-30: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 7.3 sec, wind 4 kt WSW, water 66°F. Low tide: 02:15, 14:07. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Wed 2026-07-01: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 5.6 sec, wind 8 kt SW, water 63°F. Low tide: 02:55, 14:49. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.6 sec). Thu 2026-07-02: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.8 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 6 kt NW, water 65°F. Low tide: 03:32, 15:27. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.8 ft); period too short (5.2 sec). Fri 2026-07-03: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 12:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 4 kt NW, water 71°F. Low tide: 04:07, 16:04. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-04: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 8 kt WNW, water 68°F. Low tide: 04:41, 16:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 4 INTERESTING, 3 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Sun 2026-06-28: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 2 kt SSW, water 66°F. Low tide: 00:48, 12:39. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (SSW).
  • Mon 2026-06-29: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 2 kt NW, water 67°F. Low tide: 01:32, 13:24. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Tue 2026-06-30: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 7.3 sec, wind 4 kt WSW, water 66°F. Low tide: 02:15, 14:07. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Wed 2026-07-01: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 5.6 sec, wind 8 kt SW, water 63°F. Low tide: 02:55, 14:49. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.6 sec).
  • Thu 2026-07-02: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.8 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 6 kt NW, water 65°F. Low tide: 03:32, 15:27. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.8 ft); period too short (5.2 sec).
  • Fri 2026-07-03: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 12:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 4 kt NW, water 71°F. Low tide: 04:07, 16:04. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-04: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 8 kt WNW, water 68°F. Low tide: 04:41, 16:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
